vision: A focused mobile task management solution that helps individuals capture, track, and complete daily tasks without unnecessary complexity.

epics.name: Task Creation and Management
epics.description: Core functionality allowing users to create, edit, and delete tasks with titles and optional due dates

stories.title: Create a new task with title
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to create a new task with a title, so that I can capture items I need to accomplish
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the task list screen When I tap the add task button and enter a title and confirm Then a new task appears in my task list
Given I am creating a new task When I leave the title field empty Then I am prevented from saving the task
stories.notes: Foundation for all task management functionality

stories.title: Add optional due date to task
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to set an optional due date when creating a task, so that I can track when tasks need to be completed
acceptance_criteria: Given I am creating a new task When I tap the due date field Then I can select a date from a date picker
Given I am creating a new task When I skip the due date field and save Then the task is created without a due date

stories.title: Delete a task from the list
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to delete a task, so that I can remove items that are no longer relevant
acceptance_criteria: Given I am viewing my task list When I perform the delete action on a task Then the task is permanently removed from my list
Given I delete a task When I return to the task list Then the deleted task no longer appears

stories.title: Edit task details after creation
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to edit a task's title and due date after creation, so that I can correct mistakes or update information
acceptance_criteria: Given I am viewing my task list When I tap on a task Then I can modify the title and save changes
Given I am editing a task When I change the due date and save Then the updated due date is displayed
Given I am editing a task When I clear the due date and save Then the task shows no due date

epics.name: Task Completion Tracking
epics.description: Functionality to mark tasks as complete and track progress on to-do items

stories.title: Mark a task as complete
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to mark a task as complete, so that I can track my progress and see what I've accomplished
acceptance_criteria: Given I am viewing my task list When I tap the completion checkbox on a task Then the task is visually marked as complete
Given a task is marked complete When I view the task list Then the completed task appears with a distinct visual style

stories.title: Unmark a completed task as incomplete
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to unmark a completed task, so that I can restore it to active status if marked by mistake
acceptance_criteria: Given a task is marked as complete When I tap the completion checkbox again Then the task returns to incomplete status
Given I restore a task to incomplete When I view the task list Then the task appears in normal style

epics.name: Task List Viewing
epics.description: Display and navigation features for viewing tasks in the application

stories.title: View all tasks in scrollable list
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to view all my tasks in a scrollable list, so that I can see everything I need to do
acceptance_criteria: Given I have multiple tasks When I open the app Then I see all tasks displayed in a vertical list
Given I have more tasks than fit on screen When I scroll down Then I can see additional tasks

stories.title: Display due date on each task
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to see the due date displayed alongside each task, so that I know when tasks need to be completed
acceptance_criteria: Given a task has a due date When I view the task list Then the due date is visible next to the task title
Given a task has no due date When I view the task list Then no date is displayed for that task

stories.title: Filter to show only incomplete tasks
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to filter the list to show only incomplete tasks, so that I can focus on what still needs to be done
acceptance_criteria: Given I have both complete and incomplete tasks When I select the incomplete filter Then only incomplete tasks are displayed
Given I am viewing filtered incomplete tasks When I mark a task complete Then it disappears from the current view

stories.title: Filter to show only completed tasks
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to filter the list to show only completed tasks, so that I can review what I've accomplished
acceptance_criteria: Given I have both complete and incomplete tasks When I select the completed filter Then only completed tasks are displayed
Given I am viewing filtered completed tasks When I unmark a task Then it disappears from the current view

epics.name: Data Persistence
epics.description: Ensure tasks are saved and persist between app sessions and work offline

stories.title: Persist tasks between app sessions
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want my tasks to be saved automatically, so that they are still there when I reopen the app
acceptance_criteria: Given I have created tasks When I close and reopen the app Then all my tasks are still present
Given I have marked tasks complete When I close and reopen the app Then the completion status is preserved

stories.title: Access tasks without internet connection
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to access and manage my tasks offline, so that I can use the app without internet connectivity
acceptance_criteria: Given I have no internet connection When I open the app Then I can view all my existing tasks
Given I have no internet connection When I create or complete tasks Then the changes are saved locally
stories.notes: Builds on local persistence from US-011

epics.name: Cross-Platform Support
epics.description: Ensure the application works on both iOS and Android mobile platforms

stories.title: Run app on iOS devices
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to use the app on my iPhone or iPad, so that I can manage tasks on my preferred Apple device
acceptance_criteria: Given I have an iOS device When I install the app Then it launches and functions correctly
Given I am using iOS When I perform all task operations Then they work according to platform conventions

stories.title: Run app on Android devices
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to use the app on my Android phone or tablet, so that I can manage tasks on my preferred Android device
acceptance_criteria: Given I have an Android device When I install the app Then it launches and functions correctly
Given I am using Android When I perform all task operations Then they work according to platform conventions

epics.name: Empty States and Onboarding
epics.description: Handle empty states and guide new users through first-time experience

stories.title: Show helpful empty state message
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to see a helpful message when I have no tasks, so that I understand how to get started
acceptance_criteria: Given I have no tasks When I view the task list Then I see a friendly message indicating the list is empty
Given I have no tasks When I view the empty state Then I see guidance on how to create my first task

stories.title: Show empty state for filtered views
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to see appropriate messages when a filtered view is empty, so that I understand why no tasks appear
acceptance_criteria: Given I filter to completed tasks and have none When I view the list Then I see a message indicating no completed tasks
Given I filter to incomplete tasks and have none When I view the list Then I see a message indicating all tasks are done
